title: selinum carvi
intro: Selinum carvi, also known as Lovage or Lovage root, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, known for its tall stalks and large, umbrella-like leaves. The medicinal properties of Selinum carvi include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which are derived from its essential oils and other compounds. The health benefits of Lovage root include reducing inflammation and pain, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and aiding digestion. Lovage root can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and dried roots, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
